name: read_file
description: Reads the given file or a chunk of it. Generally, symbolic operations like find_symbol or find_referencing_symbols should be preferred if you know which symbols you are looking for.

relative_path.description: the relative path to the file to read

start_line.description: the 0-based index of the first line to be retrieved

end_line.description: the 0-based index of the last line to be retrieved (inclusive). If None, read until the end of the file.

max_answer_chars.description: if the file (chunk) is longer than this number of characters, no content will be returned

name: create_text_file
description: Write a new file or overwrite an existing file.

relative_path.description: the relative path to the file to create

content.description: the content to write to the file

name: list_dir
description: Lists files and directories in the given directory (optionally with recursion).

relative_path.description: the relative path to the directory to list; pass '.' to scan the project root

name: find_file
description: Finds non-gitignored files matching the given file mask within the given relative path.

file_mask.description: the filename or file mask (using the wildcards * or ?) to search for

relative_path.description: the relative path to the directory to search in; pass '.' to scan the project root

name: replace_content
description: Replaces one or more occurrences of a given pattern in a file with new content.

relative_path.description: the relative path to the file

mode.description: whether to use literal or regex matching

name: delete_lines
description: Deletes the given lines in the file.

relative_path.description: the relative path to the file

start_line.description: the 0-based index of the first line to delete

end_line.description: the 0-based index of the last line to delete (inclusive)

name: replace_lines
description: Replaces the given range of lines in the given file.

relative_path.description: the relative path to the file

name: insert_at_line
description: Inserts the given content at the given line in the file, pushing existing content down.

relative_path.description: the relative path to the file

line.description: the 0-based line number to insert at

name: search_for_pattern
description: Performs a search for a pattern in the project.

name: restart_language_server
description: Restarts the language server, may be necessary when edits not through Serena happen.

name: get_symbols_overview
description: Use this tool to get a high-level understanding of the code symbols in a file.

relative_path.description: the relative path to the file

depth.description: the depth of nesting to include

name: find_symbol
description: Performs a global (or local) search for symbols using the language server backend.

name_path_pattern.description: the name path pattern to search for

name: find_referencing_symbols
description: Finds symbols that reference the given symbol using the language server backend.

name_path.description: the name path of the symbol to find references for

relative_path.description: the relative path containing the symbol

name: replace_symbol_body
description: Replaces the full definition of a symbol using the language server backend.

name_path.description: the name path of the symbol

relative_path.description: the relative path containing the symbol

name: insert_after_symbol
description: Inserts content after the end of the definition of a given symbol.

name_path.description: the name path of the symbol

relative_path.description: the relative path containing the symbol

name: insert_before_symbol
description: Inserts content before the beginning of the definition of a given symbol.

name_path.description: the name path of the symbol

relative_path.description: the relative path containing the symbol

name: rename_symbol
description: Renames a symbol throughout the codebase using language server refactoring capabilities.

name_path.description: the name path of the symbol to rename

relative_path.description: the relative path containing the symbol

new_name.description: the new name for the symbol

name: write_memory
description: Write information about this project that can be useful for future tasks to a memory in md format.

memory_name.description: the name of the memory file

name: read_memory
description: Reads the contents of a memory. Should only be used if the information is likely to be relevant to the current task.

memory_name.description: the name of the memory file

name: list_memories
description: Lists available memories, optionally filtered by topic.

name: delete_memory
description: Delete a memory, only call if instructed explicitly or permission was granted by the user.

memory_name.description: the name of the memory file

name: rename_memory
description: Rename or move a memory, use '/' in the name to organize into topics.

old_name.description: the current name of the memory

new_name.description: the new name for the memory

name: edit_memory
description: Replaces content matching a regular expression in a memory.

memory_name.description: the name of the memory file

name: execute_shell_command
description: Execute a shell command and return its output.

name: open_dashboard
description: Opens the Serena web dashboard in the default web browser.

name: activate_project
description: Activates a project based on the project name or path.

project.description: the name of a registered project to activate or a path to a project directory

name: remove_project
description: Removes a project from the Serena configuration.

project_name.description: Name of the project to remove

name: switch_modes
description: Activates modes by providing a list of their names.

modes.description: the names of the modes to activate

name: get_current_config
description: Print the current configuration of the agent, including the active and available projects, tools, contexts, and modes.

name: check_onboarding_performed
description: Checks whether project onboarding was already performed.

name: onboarding
description: Performs onboarding for the project, identifying the project structure and essential tasks.

name: think_about_collected_information
description: Think about the collected information and whether it is sufficient and relevant.

name: think_about_task_adherence
description: Think about the task at hand and whether you are still on track.

name: think_about_whether_you_are_done
description: Whenever you feel that you are done with what the user has asked for, call this tool to verify completion.

name: summarize_changes
description: Provides instructions for summarizing the changes made to the codebase.

name: prepare_for_new_conversation
description: Instructions for preparing for a new conversation.

name: initial_instructions
description: Provides the Serena Instructions Manual with essential information on how to use the toolbox.

name: jet_brains_find_symbol
description: Performs a global (or local) search for symbols using the JetBrains backend.

name_path_pattern.description: the name path pattern to search for

name: jet_brains_find_referencing_symbols
description: Finds symbols that reference the given symbol using the JetBrains backend.

name_path.description: the name path of the symbol

relative_path.description: the relative path containing the symbol

name: jet_brains_get_symbols_overview
description: Gets an overview of the top-level symbols in the given file using the JetBrains backend.

relative_path.description: the relative path to the file

name: jet_brains_type_hierarchy
description: Gets the type hierarchy (supertypes, subtypes, or both) of a symbol using the JetBrains backend.

name_path.description: the name path of the symbol

relative_path.description: the relative path containing the symbol

name: list_queryable_projects
description: Lists available projects that can be queried with query_project tool.

symbol_access.description: whether to return only projects for which symbol access is available

name: query_project
description: Queries a project by executing a read-only Serena tool in its context. Use this to query information from projects other than the activated project.

project_name.description: the name of the project to query

tool_name.description: the name of the tool to execute

tool_params_json.description: the parameters as a JSON string
